DISCOVERY, 612, DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS MOOT AS THERE HAS BEEN A SUPPLEMENTAL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THAT PRODUCTION ON THIS MOTION. ISSUE OF SANCTIONS IS SUBMITTED ON DEC-01-2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT WALDEN HOUSE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES. HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS THE OBJECTIONS TO 8.4 ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. AS TO 8.4, THE RESPONSE IS INADEQUATE AS IT DID NOT STATE HOW THE AMOUNT WAS CALCULATED. IF THE AMOUNT WAS CALCULATED BY REFERRING TO THE AGREEMENT, THAT MUST BE STATED IN THE RESPONSE. THE RESPONSE OTHERWISE IS ADEQUATE. AS TO 8.7 AND 8.8, THE OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. THE RESPONSES ARE OTHERWISE ADEQUATE. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT FINDS THAT THE LATE CANCELLATION OF THE DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST MR. DAY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,580, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. MR. DAY DID NOT GIVE NOTICE OF INTENT TO APPEAR. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
W. Stephen Wilson, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Flair Diversified Properties
Michael Day, Deponent

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Walden House, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Appearance Of Michael Day For Deposition Pursuant To Subpoena is moot as it seeks Mr. Day's appearance. The court finds that the late cancellation of the deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Mr. Day in the amount of $1,580, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. Mr. Day did not give notice of intent to appear. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
W. Stephen Wilson, Esq. of TOBIN & TOBIN (415-433-1400), appearing for defendant / moving party Walden House
Ben A. Sange, Esq. of Rentschler/Tursi (650-524-1980), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Flair Diversified Properties LLC

RULING:
Defendant Walden House, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories. HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Motion is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as the objections to 8.4 are overruled and ordered stricken. As to 8.4, the response is inadequate as it did not state how the amount was calculated. If the amount was calculated by referring to the agreement, that must be stated in the response. The response otherwise is adequate. As to 8.7 and 8.8, the objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses are otherwise adequate. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
